channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace

item.title: Viper Syntax Highlighting - Mon Jul 06 13:23:18 UTC 2026
item.description:
Syntax highlighting for the Viper intermediate verification language (.vpr files). Features: Syntax highlighting for keywords, types, operators, comments, and literals...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.viper.syntax
